$comment: Allowlist for the Lab gallery (docs/showcase/lab). Only entries listed here are copied to public/lab/ and surfaced on the site. `source` is repo-root-relative. Title/description here OVERRIDE what generate-lab-data.mjs extracts from the HTML <head>. Run `node docs/site/scripts/generate-lab-data.mjs` after editing.

entries.title: CC Adoption Wave — 2.1.210 → 2.1.212
entries.description: 37 auto-filed adoption issues across three Claude Code releases. Filter by version, category, and gap score, click cards to build a work batch, and copy a triage prompt.

entries.title: Issue Triage — 98 Open Issues
entries.description: The whole open-issue backlog as one interactive board: drag to triage, milestone breakdowns, and a copy-out execution prompt for the chosen batch.

entries.title: Session Standing — Decision Board
entries.description: Drag-to-triage standing board for session outcomes: mouse, touch, and keyboard reorder, live buckets, and a prioritization prompt composer.

entries.title: Portfolio Bundle — Decision Board
entries.description: The decision board that planned this very Lab: 18 brainstormed ideas scored and mocked up, with a prompt composer that emitted the implementation instruction.

entries.title: Multi-Agent Coordination — Swarm vs Agents vs Workflow
entries.description: State-of-practice explainer comparing coordinator/worker swarms, agent teams, and deterministic workflows, with when-to-use guidance per topology.

entries.title: Vercel Labs — 8 Adoption Ideas
entries.description: Impact-vs-effort explorer for adopting emulate, portless, agent-browser, and json-render capabilities into OrchestKit.

entries.title: Vercel Labs Integration — Staged Plan
entries.description: Stage-composable integration plan: pick a stage, see what changes, click idea cards for full detail. Each stage assumes the prior one shipped.

entries.title: M126 Bundle B — ultrareview + Fork Subagents
entries.description: Deep-dive explainer for the claude ultrareview subcommand and CLAUDE_CODE_FORK_SUBAGENT adoption bundle.

entries.title: OrchestKit × Superpowers — Gap Analysis
entries.description: Side-by-side of OrchestKit today vs improvements recommended by the Superpowers plugin analysis.

entries.title: Library-Currency Audit — 2026-05-31
entries.description: Verifier-corrected audit of library freshness across the toolchain, with severity re-ranks shown transparently.
